goal: Land G4 (Architecture) parallel-query orchestrator with edge-union + BFS-blast-radius merger in a new ucil-daemon::g4 module, exercised by the frozen test executor::test_g4_architecture_query that asserts parallelism, edge dedup-on-union, ground-truth-on-conflict (sentinel-marked), BFS depth-tracking, coupling-weight propagation, per-source-error/timeout resilience, and master-deadline trip.
plan_summary: Mirroring WO-0070's G3 shape (orchestrator + DI-seam trait + dual-deadline ladder + frozen test) and applying every lessons-learned hint from phase-log/03-phase-3/CLAUDE.md (WO-0067/0068/0069/0070/0072): per-source deadline as unconditional const NOT min'd with master_deadline; #[allow(dead_code)] on the parallel-join helper so the M1 sequential-await mutation compiles cleanly under #![deny(warnings)]; module-root frozen-test placement in executor.rs (NOT under mod tests {}); SA-numbered panic bodies; tightened parallelism upper bound computed from max_per_source_sleep_ms * (N/2) NOT a round number; multi-thread tokio test flavor for parallelism observability; alphabetical pub mod / pub use placement; AC25 reworded to `git log feat ^main --merges` empty (per WO-0070 lessons); standing-protocol coverage workaround now 28 WOs deep. New file crates/ucil-daemon/src/g4.rs holds G4Source trait (DEC-0008 §4 dependency-inversion seam), G4Query, G4DependencyEdge, G4EdgeKind, G4SourceOutput, G4SourceStatus, G4Outcome, G4UnifiedEdge, G4BlastRadiusEntry, G4UnionOutcome, plus pub async fn execute_g4 (parallel orchestrator under master+per-source deadlines) and pub fn merge_g4_dependency_union (edge-union + BFS-blast-radius per master-plan §5.4 lines 483-500). The frozen test test_g4_architecture_query lives at module root in crates/ucil-daemon/src/executor.rs (DEC-0007) supplied with three local TestG4Source impls (DEC-0008 §4) returning canned (edges, blast_radius_nodes) tuples; SA1..SA8 cover parallelism, edge-union dedup, conflict-resolution-sentinel-acceptance, BFS-depth, coupling-weight propagation, partial-error, partial-timeout, master-deadline. Pre-baked M1/M2/M3 mutation contract names file/line/restore for verifier. No new deps; async-trait already a workspace dep. No mocks of MCP/JSON-RPC/subprocess — real subprocess wiring (CodeGraphContextG4Source / LSPCallHierarchyG4Source impls calling F08 plugin + P1-W5-F06 LSP bridge) is DEFERRED to a follow-up production-wiring WO. classify_query/parse_reason re-export deferral from WO-0067/0068 stays deferred. Ground-truth-on-conflict (master-plan §5.4 line 494 'parse actual imports as ground truth, merge inferred relations') has a sentinel comment + reserved G4DependencyEdge::origin field but the resolution branch is not yet load-bearing — lands when dependency-cruiser (P3-W10-F14) / deptry plug in.
scope_in: 1. NEW file crates/ucil-daemon/src/g4.rs (DEC-0005 module-coherence; one cohesive feat commit even if 700-900 LOC). Public surface: G4Query (changed_nodes: Vec<String>, max_blast_depth: u32, max_edges: usize), G4DependencyEdge { source: String, target: String, edge_kind: G4EdgeKind, source_id: String, origin: G4EdgeOrigin (Inferred/GroundTruth - origin is reserved for future ground-truth-on-conflict branch per master-plan §5.4 line 494; currently always Inferred from CodeGraphContext + LSP), coupling_weight: f64 in [0.0, 1.0] }, G4EdgeKind enum { Import, Call, Inherits, Implements, Other(String) }, G4EdgeOrigin enum { Inferred, GroundTruth }, G4SourceOutput { source_id: String, status: G4SourceStatus (Available/TimedOut/Errored), elapsed_ms: u64, edges: Vec<G4DependencyEdge>, error: Option<String> }, G4Outcome { results: Vec<G4SourceOutput>, wall_elapsed_ms: u64, master_timed_out: bool }, G4UnifiedEdge { edge: G4DependencyEdge, contributing_source_ids: Vec<String> }, G4BlastRadiusEntry { node: String, depth: u32, cumulative_coupling: f64, contributing_edges: Vec<(String, String)> /* (source, target) */ }, G4UnionOutcome { unified_edges: Vec<G4UnifiedEdge>, blast_radius: Vec<G4BlastRadiusEntry>, total_edges_in: usize, total_unique_edges_out: usize, sources_contributing: usize }, pub trait G4Source: Send + Sync (fn source_id(&self) -> &str; async fn execute(&self, query: &G4Query) -> G4SourceOutput).

2. Constants in g4.rs: pub const G4_MASTER_DEADLINE: Duration = Duration::from_millis(5_000); pub const G4_PER_SOURCE_DEADLINE: Duration = Duration::from_millis(4_500). Per WO-0068 lessons-learned 'For executor' #2 + WO-0070 lessons-learned 'For executor' #2: the per-source deadline is an UNCONDITIONAL const, NOT min'd with master_deadline. The per-source only wins on true global stalls (sleeper > 4.5 s); the master only wins on tight budgets (master < 4.5 s). Document the inversion inline at the deadline-computation site with a citation to WO-0068/0070 lessons-learned.

3. pub async fn execute_g4(query: G4Query, sources: Vec<Box<dyn G4Source + Send + Sync + 'static>>, master_deadline: Duration) -> G4Outcome — fans out via the SAME poll_fn-based join_all_g4 helper shape as executor::join_all_g1 (WO-0047) and g3::join_all_g3 (WO-0070). Per-source futures wrapped in a private run_g4_source helper that applies tokio::time::timeout(G4_PER_SOURCE_DEADLINE, source.execute(...)) and on timeout returns G4SourceOutput { status: TimedOut, ... }. Decorate with #[tracing::instrument(skip(sources), fields(source_count = %sources.len()))] per master-plan §15.2 (this is async/IO orchestration — tracing applies, unlike the WO-0067 pure-deterministic ceqp.rs).

4. Private helper: async fn join_all_g4<'a, T>(futures: Vec<Pin<Box<dyn Future<Output = T> + Send + 'a>>>) -> Vec<T> — same poll_fn fan-out shape as executor::join_all_g1 (executor.rs:1035-1067) and g3::join_all_g3 (g3.rs:344-376). Annotate the helper with #[allow(dead_code)] + a rustdoc citing the WO-0073 M1 mutation contract. Reason: WO-0070 lessons-learned 'For executor' #2 — the M1 mutation pattern (replace parallel fan-out with sequential `.await` loop) orphans the helper, and #![deny(warnings)] (lib.rs:152) converts the dead-code warning into a compile error. The pre-emptive #[allow(dead_code)] keeps the mutation atomic and one-step.

5. pub fn merge_g4_dependency_union(outputs: &[G4SourceOutput], query: &G4Query) -> G4UnionOutcome — edge-union + BFS-blast-radius per master-plan §5.4 lines 483-500. Algorithm: (a) collect all G4DependencyEdge from non-Errored / non-TimedOut sources (Errored/TimedOut sources contribute zero edges); (b) deduplicate edges by structural equality (source, target, edge_kind) — when ≥2 sources contribute the same edge, merge into a single G4UnifiedEdge with all contributing source_ids in the contributing_source_ids vector and the maximum coupling_weight (highest-confidence-wins per master-plan §5.3-style invariant adapted for §5.4); (c) ground-truth-on-conflict resolution (master-plan §5.4 line 494 'parse actual imports as ground truth, merge inferred relations') is a SENTINEL-COMMENTED branch — when dependency-cruiser (P3-W10-F14) / deptry / other ground-truth sources plug in, the resolver upgrades GroundTruth-origin edges over Inferred-origin edges for the same (source, target, edge_kind) tuple. F09 ships the sentinel + the data-model field (G4EdgeOrigin) but the resolution branch is NOT load-bearing yet (no SA tests it) — same shape as WO-0070's validity_window deferral; (d) BFS-blast-radius computation: starting from each query.changed_node, BFS forward (and backward — both directions; emit (source, target) edges as bidirectional adjacency for blast-radius purposes per master-plan §5.4 line 495 'BFS from changed nodes, weight by coupling strength'); track depth per node (BFS layer); track cumulative_coupling per node (multiplicative product along the BFS path: cumulative_coupling[child] = cumulative_coupling[parent] * edge.coupling_weight, with cumulative_coupling[changed_node] = 1.0 — multiplicative shape lets weak-coupling chains decay quickly per master-plan §5.4 line 495 'weight by coupling strength'); cap depth at query.max_blast_depth; cap unified_edges at query.max_edges (top-N by coupling_weight). Output total_edges_in (sum of edges from all Available sources, pre-dedup), total_unique_edges_out (unified_edges.len()), sources_contributing (count of distinct source_ids that contributed at least one edge that survived the union).

6. Add `pub mod g4;` to crates/ucil-daemon/src/lib.rs alphabetically BETWEEN `pub mod g3;` (line 159) and `pub mod lancedb_indexer;` (line 160). Per WO-0068 lessons-learned 'For planner' #4 + WO-0070 lessons-learned 'For planner' #5: the alphabetical convention wins — `g4` slots between `g3` and `lancedb_indexer`. The line range will become 159-161 after insertion.

7. Add a #[rustfmt::skip] pub use block in crates/ucil-daemon/src/lib.rs for the new types, alphabetically positioned BETWEEN the existing `pub use g3::...` block (line 190) and `pub use lancedb_indexer::...` block (line 192). Re-export: G4Source, G4Query, G4DependencyEdge, G4EdgeKind, G4EdgeOrigin, G4SourceOutput, G4SourceStatus, G4Outcome, G4UnifiedEdge, G4BlastRadiusEntry, G4UnionOutcome, execute_g4, merge_g4_dependency_union, G4_MASTER_DEADLINE, G4_PER_SOURCE_DEADLINE.

8. NEW frozen test crates/ucil-daemon/src/executor.rs::test_g4_architecture_query — append after the existing test_g3_parallel_merge section (executor.rs line ~3300+ region). Place at MODULE ROOT inside the executor.rs file (NOT under `mod tests { ... }`) per DEC-0007 + WO-0068/0070 lessons. Signature: #[cfg(test)] #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines, clippy::missing_panics_doc)] #[tokio::test(flavor = "multi_thread", worker_threads = 4)] pub async fn test_g4_architecture_query() {}. The substring selector `executor::test_g4_architecture_query` MUST resolve cleanly (NOT `executor::tests::test_g4_architecture_query`). This is the literal acceptance_tests selector frozen in feature-list.json for P3-W9-F09. Imports: use crate::g4::{...}; — types come from the daemon crate.

9. Inside test_g4_architecture_query: define enum TestBehaviour { ReturnEdges(Vec<G4DependencyEdge>), Sleep(Duration, Vec<G4DependencyEdge>), Error(String), LongSleep(Duration), Empty }. Define struct TestG4Source { id: String, behaviour: TestBehaviour }. Implement #[async_trait::async_trait] G4Source for TestG4Source: source_id returns &self.id, execute matches on behaviour and returns appropriate G4SourceOutput. Per DEC-0008 §4 these are UCIL-internal trait impls (NOT mocks of any external wire format) — the same shape as WO-0047's TestG1Source and WO-0070's TestG3Source. Helper fn make_edge(source: &str, target: &str, kind: G4EdgeKind, weight: f64, src_id: &str) -> G4DependencyEdge for ergonomic construction.

10. Frozen-test sub-assertions (target ≥7 SAs, each carrying `(SAn) <semantic name>; left: ...; right: ...` panic body per DEC-0007). SA1 — Parallelism: 3 sources each Sleep(200 ms, ...) must return wall_elapsed_ms in [180, 500) (lower-bound proves at least one source's sleep elapsed; upper-bound TIGHTENED to 500 ms per WO-0070 lessons-learned 'For planner' #1 — compute upper bound from max_per_source_sleep_ms * (N_sources / 2) = 200 * (3/2) = 300 ms target, with a 200 ms noise margin → 500 ms ceiling. The literal scope_in upper bound MUST flip the M1 sequential-execution mutation: 3×200 ms = 600 ms sequential serially-await total > 500 ms ceiling → SA1 panic. NOT a round-number 700 ms — that would slip serial-execution through). SA2 — Edge dedup on union: source A returns [(foo→bar, weight=0.7)] AND source B returns [(foo→bar, weight=0.9), (bar→baz, weight=0.5)]; merge.unified_edges contains exactly 2 unique edges (foo→bar deduped, bar→baz unique); the deduped foo→bar entry has contributing_source_ids = ["src-a", "src-b"] (sorted lexicographically) AND coupling_weight == 0.9 (max wins). SA3 — Different sources contribute disjoint edges: source A returns [(a→b, 0.5)], source B returns [(c→d, 0.5)]; merge.unified_edges contains BOTH edges (length 2) AND merge.sources_contributing == 2. SA4 — BFS-blast-radius depth-tracking: query.changed_nodes = ["root"]; edges = [(root→child1, 1.0), (child1→grandchild, 1.0), (child1→cousin, 1.0)]; merge.blast_radius contains entries with depths {root:0, child1:1, grandchild:2, cousin:2}; query.max_blast_depth=3 → all 4 nodes present; with max_blast_depth=1 → only {root, child1} present (length 2). SA5 — Coupling-weight propagation (multiplicative): query.changed_nodes = ["a"]; edges = [(a→b, 0.9), (a→c, 0.1), (b→d, 1.0), (c→e, 1.0)]; cumulative_coupling for {a:1.0, b:0.9, c:0.1, d:0.9 (=0.9*1.0), e:0.1 (=0.1*1.0)}; assert blast_radius entries have these weights with floating-point tolerance ±0.001. The multiplicative-not-additive shape is the load-bearing semantic per master-plan §5.4 line 495. SA6 — Partial-Errored: 1 of 3 sources returns Errored; outcome.results carries exactly 1 Errored + 2 Available, AND merge proceeds successfully without including the errored source's contributions (the union ignores Errored sources). SA7 — Partial-TimedOut: 1 of 3 sources LongSleep(6 s) (> G4_PER_SOURCE_DEADLINE = 4.5 s); outcome.results carries exactly 1 TimedOut + 2 Available, wall_elapsed_ms < 5500 ms (per-source 4.5 s ceiling fires before master 5 s). SA8 — Master-deadline-trip: master_deadline=100 ms, all 3 sources Sleep(7 s, ...) → outcome.master_timed_out == true AND wall_elapsed_ms < 2000 ms (master deadline trips before per-source). Per WO-0068 lessons-learned 'For planner' #3 + WO-0070: this SA is COMPATIBLE with the unconditional-const per-source deadline — the per-source CONST never gets shortened to master_deadline.

11. Pre-baked M1/M2/M3 mutation contract (verifier applies in-place via Edit, NOT git stash; takes md5sum snapshot first; runs targeted cargo test selector; observes SA-tagged panic; restores via git checkout -- <file>; confirms md5sum match). M1 — Sequential execution: in crates/ucil-daemon/src/g4.rs execute_g4, replace the parallel join (`join_all_g4(futures)` call) with a sequential `let mut outputs = Vec::with_capacity(sources.len()); for source in sources.into_iter() { let r = run_g4_source(source, &query).await; outputs.push(r); }` loop (or equivalent). The orphaned join_all_g4 helper carries #[allow(dead_code)] per scope_in #4, so the mutation compiles cleanly. Targeted selector: `cargo test -p ucil-daemon executor::test_g4_architecture_query`. Expected: SA1 (Parallelism) panics with `(SA1) parallel wall < 500 ms; left: 600+, right: 500`. Restore: `git checkout -- crates/ucil-daemon/src/g4.rs`. M2 — Inverted edge dedup: in merge_g4_dependency_union, replace the dedup branch's `if matches existing edge { merge contributing_source_ids and update max coupling_weight }` with `if !matches existing edge { ... }` (or equivalent that keeps duplicates). Targeted selector: same as M1. Expected: SA2 (Edge dedup on union) panics with `(SA2) unified_edges.len() == 2; left: 3, right: 2` (the foo→bar edge survives twice because dedup is inverted). M3 — BFS depth off-by-two: in the BFS-blast-radius computation, replace `let next_depth = current_depth + 1;` with `let next_depth = current_depth + 2;` (cleaner than off-by-one because off-by-one matches `max_blast_depth=3` happens to terminate the same; +2 deterministically skips a layer). Targeted selector: same as M1. Expected: SA4 (BFS depth-tracking) panics with `(SA4) BFS depth child1 == 1; left: 2, right: 1` (or equivalent — child1 should be depth 1 but mutation makes it depth 2). The verifier applies each mutation in isolation (one at a time), confirms targeted SA fails, restores file, runs full test to confirm restoration, then proceeds to next mutation.

12. NEW file scripts/verify/P3-W9-F09.sh (chmod +x). Bash strict mode (set -euo pipefail). Exits 0 iff `cargo test -p ucil-daemon executor::test_g4_architecture_query --no-fail-fast 2>&1 | tee /tmp/p3-w9-f09-test.log` exits 0 AND grep -qE '^test executor::test_g4_architecture_query \.\.\. ok$' /tmp/p3-w9-f09-test.log. Echoes `[PASS] P3-W9-F09: G4 architecture parallel-query frozen test green` on success, `[FAIL] P3-W9-F09: ...` on failure. Mirrors scripts/verify/P3-W9-F03.sh / P3-W9-F04.sh / P3-W9-F07.sh shape from WO-0068/0070. NO mocks. NO env-gated short-circuits — the test is fully synthetic (TestG4Source local impls; no subprocess, no API key, no plugin manager invocation).

Test-helper structs named TestG4Source / SleepingG4Source / ErroringG4Source under #[cfg(test)] in executor.rs are EXEMPT (precedent: WO-0048 line 363 #[cfg(test)] carve-out, reaffirmed by WO-0068/0070 lessons-learned). Use the SAME poll_fn-based join_all_g4 helper shape as executor::join_all_g1 / g3::join_all_g3 — no extra dep needed (no JoinSet, no futures::future::join_all).

P3-W9-F08.rationale: F08 (CodeGraphContext G4 manifest) ships per WO-0072. F09 consumes the manifest in concept (real CodeGraphContextG4Source impl deferred to a follow-up production-wiring WO).

P1-W5-F06.rationale: F06 (Diagnostics bridge call hierarchy + type hierarchy → G4) ships in Phase 1; F09 consumes it in concept (real LSPCallHierarchyG4Source impl deferred to a follow-up production-wiring WO).

P3-W9-F03.rationale: F03 (cross-group parallel executor) ships per WO-0068. F09's execute_g4 is a sibling of cross-group::execute_cross_group; both follow the same DEC-0008 §4 DI-seam pattern. Group::G4 enum variant exists from WO-0068.

lessons_applied_summary: WO-0067/0068/0069/0070/0072: pre-bake M1/M2/M3 mutation contract in scope_in #11 + acceptance_criteria AC21/AC22/AC23 with file/line/restore command for verifier
WO-0068/0070: frozen-test-at-module-root in executor.rs NOT under mod tests {} (scope_in #8); substring selector executor::test_g4_architecture_query resolves cleanly
WO-0068/0070: per-source deadline as unconditional const NOT min'd with master_deadline (scope_in #2)
WO-0067: §15.2 tracing applies to async/IO orchestration — decorate execute_g4 with #[tracing::instrument(...)] (scope_in #3, AC15)
WO-0068/0070: alphabetical pub mod / pub use placement — g4 between g3 and lancedb_indexer (scope_in #6, #7)
WO-0067/0068/0069/0070: DEC-0007 SA-numbered panic bodies for mutation-diagnosis trivia (scope_in #10)
WO-0069: word-ban grep production-side; test impls named with Test/G4Source suffix exempt (scope_in #13, AC17)
WO-0068/0070: no mocks of MCP/JSON-RPC/subprocess — UCIL-owned DI seam, real subprocess wiring deferred (scope_in #1, scope_out #1)

WO-0070: compute parallelism dual-bound upper limit from max_per_source_sleep_ms * (N_sources / 2) — SA1 ceiling tightened to 500 ms for 3×200 ms sources, NOT a round 700 ms (scope_in #10 SA1)
WO-0070: multi-thread tokio test flavor for parallelism observability (scope_in #8 — `#[tokio::test(flavor = "multi_thread", worker_threads = 4)]`)
WO-0070: AC25 reworded from `feat..main = 0` to `git log feat ^main --merges = 0` — workflow-timing tolerant (acceptance_criteria AC26)
WO-0072: standing coverage workaround now 28 WOs deep — urgency lower than previously assessed per WO-0072 verifier report; continue scope_out + AC23 standing protocol (scope_in #17, AC24)
